news.headline: Fuel Crisis Creates Commuter Crush in the Philippines
news.summary: Rising fuel prices in the Philippines have disrupted daily commutes, forcing people to ditch their cars for overcrowded trains and minibuses.

news.headline: Before World Cup, FIFA slammed for politicising sport with Trump prize
news.summary: Football officials and players question FIFA’s decision to award its inaugural Peace Prize to US President Donald Trump.

news.headline: Internet Restrictions Spur Russians to Openly Question Putin’s Moves
news.summary: From beauty influencers to the token political opposition, Russians are openly questioning President Vladimir V. Putin’s moves to hamstring access.
